case_title: THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA VS. PHILIDELPHIA REINSURANCE CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: MINI MINUTES FOR MAR-19-2020 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302
COURT REPORTING SERVICES LESS THAN 1 HOUR (TRANSACTION ID # 100097016) FILED BY DEFENDANT PHILADELPHIA REINSURANCE CORP

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT PHILADELPHIA REINSURANCE CORP'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. ORDER IS SIGNED. JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN, CLERK: S. LE, NOT REPORTED. =(302/EPS)
